overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror video game featuring a character in a green leather jacket exploring a dark, rainy, foggy urban environment at night. The character navigates from a narrow brick corridor through a truck parking lot with a glowing neon sign, then onto foggy streets with parked vehicles and streetlights.

events.description: approaching the exit of the narrow corridor, light visible at the end

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the narrow wet corridor toward the distant exit

entered.detail: tall weathered brick wall with dark water stains and pipes
tall weathered brick wall with metal fixtures and shelves
large reflective puddle covering the concrete floor
dark opening at the end of the corridor leading outside

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow, enclosed brick corridor with water puddles on the concrete floor. The walls are weathered industrial brick, and the corridor is dimly lit as the character approaches the exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: truck parking lot with neon signage

events.description: red neon sign becomes visible in the distance on the left
approaching parked commercial trucks in the open lot

agents.ego_description: walking toward the glowing neon sign while approaching the parked vehicles

abandoned yellow school bus with dark tinted windows
large commercial truck cab with chrome details
tall street lamp illuminating the wet parking lot

segments.scene_description: Exiting the corridor, the scene opens into a rain-soaked parking lot. A bright red neon sign glows on the left while the character approaches an abandoned school bus and a large semi-truck parked ahead. Streetlights cast reflections on the wet asphalt.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between parked commercial vehicles

events.description: turning right to navigate between the parked bus and semi-truck trailer
approaching a chain link fence and gate at the end of the passage

agents.ego_description: carefully walking between the parked bus and semi-truck trailer toward the gate

entered.detail: long silver trailer with vertical ribbing and rear wheels
metal chain link fence with a gate blocking the path forward
large industrial dumpster with garbage bags visible

segments.scene_description: The character navigates a tight passage between the abandoned bus on the left and a massive semi-truck trailer on the right. The camera turns slightly as the character approaches a chain link fence and gate at the end of the parking area, with an industrial dumpster visible nearby.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy urban street with parked cars

events.description: passing through the chain link gate onto an open foggy street
fog density increases significantly reducing visibility

agents.ego_description: walking down the foggy street past parked cars illuminated by streetlights

entered.detail: dark sedan parked along the curb
tall street lamp casting light through the fog
dense atmospheric fog reducing visibility and creating beams of light

segments.scene_description: Passing through the gate, the character emerges onto a wide, foggy urban street. Streetlights pierce through the dense fog, illuminating parked cars along the sides. The atmosphere becomes increasingly obscured by fog as the character walks forward on the wet asphalt.

events.description: vehicle with headlights on becomes visible ahead near the building
slowing approach toward the stationary vehicle with illuminated headlights

agents.ego_description: cautiously approaching a vehicle with its headlights on near a building entrance

notable_agents.action: stationary vehicle with bright headlights illuminated facing the character

entered.detail: dark brick building with windows and industrial architecture
car or truck with bright headlights on, parked or stationary in the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a dark brick building on the left while moving toward a vehicle with its headlights brightly illuminated ahead. The fog remains dense around street level as the character slows down approaching the vehicle, which sits stationary in the middle of the wet road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into an expansive, fog-shrouded urban street at night. It begins with the character walking through a narrow brick passageway with water puddles on the concrete, moving steadily toward a distant exit. As the character emerges, the scene opens into a rain-soaked parking lot where a bright red neon sign glows and streetlights reflect off the wet asphalt beside an abandoned school bus and a semi-truck. The camera then navigates a tight gap between these vehicles before passing through a chain-link gate and emerging onto a wide road. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly obscured by dense fog as the character passes parked cars and approaches a stationary vehicle with brightly illuminated headlights.
